title: Tränenpalast Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Tränenpalast Berlin is a free, central Cold War museum at Friedrichstraße station.** It is strongest when you want the human story of crossing, waiting and saying goodbye.
**The official visitor information lists admission as free.** Current regular hours are Tuesday to Friday 9:00-18:00, Saturday and Sunday 10:00-18:00, and Monday closed.
**Allow 45 to 75 minutes for most first visits.** Use the free audio guide if you want more context without turning the stop into a full half-day.
**Do not treat it as a complete Berlin Wall replacement.** Pair it with the Berlin Wall Memorial if you want the border system, death strip and outdoor remains.
**It fits easily before or after the BerlinWalk route.** Friedrichstraße is a short central hop from Museum Island, Unter den Linden and the Reichstag area.
